questions.question: What country is headed by King Fahd Ibn Abdul Iziz, one of 44 sons sired by a 22-wife dad?
Whose 1990 fashion statement did Mr. Blackwell sum up as 'Yentl's gone mental'?
What member of Nixon's cabinet was depicted in a Superman outfit on a Newsweek cover that bore the caption, 'It's Super K'?
What's the term for the brain's nerve cells?
What Washington Capitals goalie earned the nicknames 'Ace' and 'Net Detective'?
Who was called 'Nembutal' on the set of High Society, while Sinatra was called 'Dexedrine'?
